description: School field trip permission and details

events.title: Field Trip - California Science Museum
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
events.description: 4th grade field trip to science museum with guided tour and planetarium show

events.title: 4th Grade Field Trip: California Science Museum
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107 (depart/return: Oakridge Elementary School)
events.description:
4th Grade field trip to the California Science Museum.

Date: Thursday, March 12, 2026
Schedule:
- 8:30 AM depart from school (bus)
- 9:30 AM arrive at museum
- 9:30–11:30 AM guided tour & exhibits
- 11:30 AM–12:15 PM lunch (students bring bag lunch; no glass containers)
- 12:15–1:30 PM planetarium show & free exploration
- 2:00 PM depart museum
- 3:00 PM return to school (regular dismissal)

Cost: $15 per student (covers admission, planetarium, and bus). Students should bring a bag lunch, water bottle, comfortable walking shoes, and a light jacket. Chaperones needed—email Mr. Johnson if interested.

Note: Permission form must be signed and returned by March 5, 2026; payment deadline is March 5, 2026.

events.title: Field Trip Payment & Permission Form Due (Science Museum)
events.description:
Deadline for the March 12, 2026 4th Grade field trip to the California Science Museum:
- Payment due: March 5, 2026 ($15 per student)
- Signed permission form due: March 5, 2026 (return to school/teacher as instructed)

Contact Mr. Johnson if you have questions or to volunteer as a chaperone.
